examples: A llama, the only draft animal on the continent, could carry 70 pounds of gear on its back.
The llama is related to the camel.
Llama and alpaca farmers have been badly hit by recurring water shortages.
Her other novels include Girls Night Out, The Llama Parlour, Foetal Attraction and Altar Ego.
Ms. LAUREN GRAHAM (Actor): (As Joan Baxter) Is that a llama with a hammer?
